items.claim: Axel Sola uses relentless forward pressure and takedowns to break opponents.
items.quote: Axel Sola moves forward, gets takedowns, stays in Bonfim's face, keeps the pressure on, and ultimately breaks Bonfim.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev was knocked out by Alex Pereira while fighting during Ramadan and coming off an injury.
items.quote: During Ramadan, coming off an injury.

items.claim: Alex Pereira is the hardest hitter the light heavyweight division has ever seen.
items.quote: The hardest hitter that division has ever seen.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev will utilize more wrestling and range management against Bogdan Guskov because he was recently knocked out.
items.quote: We probably see more wrestling from Ankalaev than we normally do, more range management than we normally do.

items.claim: Bogdan Guskov is primarily a head-hunting striker.
Bogdan Guskov is a pretty tough fighter.
